zh: 告訴果果你已經長大了、
en: Tell Gu-gu, "You're a big boy now,

zh: 希望你像媽媽一樣有自己的房間、
en: and I hope you can have your own room, like mommy,

zh: 可以看書、聽音樂、玩遊戲、多好呀、
en: where you can read, listen to music, and play — how wonderful!"

zh: 從現在起我們一起來怖置房間、
en: From now on, let's decorate the room together,

zh: 再一個星期果果就會有自己的房間、好棒喔。
en: "In one more week, Gu-gu will have his very own room — so cool!"
